# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User wants the robot icon to resemble a NAO-like robot shape while keeping their neon cyan visual style, preferring a less childish, more mature/technical robot visual style. The robot icon should follow a rounded bot style similar to the latest reference image, featuring antennae, big circular eyes, and a compact torso.
- User does not want text labels inside topic icons (e.g., no 'WWW' text in the web icon).
- User prefers a stylish, nerdy WWW icon concept (e.g., acoustic coupler or modem card aesthetic) over generic globe/web symbols. The acoustic-coupler WWW variant must read clearly at first glance and match the real coupler hardware shape (long rectangular body with two circular cups) while keeping their style.
- User wants topic icons to be immediately recognizable.
